title: Windows Server Hybrid Administrator (AZ-802)
subtitle: Manage Windows Server in Hybrid and Cloud Environments
description: Learn to manage Windows Server in hybrid and cloud environments, covering Active Directory, Azure Arc, Windows Server 2025, hybrid networking, identity synchronisation, and disaster recovery
overview: This intermediate course prepares you for the AZ-802 certification exam, the consolidated replacement for the AZ-800 and AZ-801 exams. You will learn to manage Windows Server infrastructure in hybrid environments that span on-premises datacentres and Azure. The course covers Active Directory in hybrid scenarios with Entra ID synchronisation, server infrastructure management with Azure Arc, Windows Server 2025 features, storage and Hyper-V virtualisation, hybrid networking, and disaster recovery with Azure Site Recovery. The five-day format gives sufficient time for deep hands-on labs alongside the theory.

learningObjectives.title: Identity & Hybrid Active Directory
learningObjectives.description: Manage Active Directory in hybrid scenarios, synchronise identities with Entra ID, and configure authentication across on-premises and cloud environments

learningObjectives.title: Server Infrastructure & Storage
learningObjectives.description: Deploy and manage Windows Server infrastructure, configure storage solutions, and manage servers at scale with Azure Arc

learningObjectives.title: Networking & Virtualisation
learningObjectives.description: Configure hybrid networking, manage Hyper-V virtualisation, and deploy containerised workloads on Windows Server

learningObjectives.title: Azure Integration & Disaster Recovery
learningObjectives.description: Integrate on-premises servers with Azure services, implement Azure Site Recovery, and configure backup and business continuity

modules.title: Identity & Hybrid Active Directory
modules.description: Manage Active Directory Domain Services and synchronise identities with Microsoft Entra ID for hybrid environments
topics: Active Directory Domain Services: forests, domains, trusts, and sites
Group Policy management and troubleshooting in hybrid scenarios
Microsoft Entra Connect: installation, configuration, and sync rules
Identity synchronisation between on-premises AD and Entra ID
Password hash sync, pass-through authentication, and federation
Conditional access policies for hybrid users
Entra ID Application Proxy for on-premises application access
Privileged Access Management and tiered administration
Certificate Services and PKI for hybrid environments

modules.title: Server Infrastructure & Storage
modules.description: Deploy, manage, and monitor Windows Server infrastructure with Azure Arc integration
topics: Windows Server 2025: new features and migration paths
Server deployment: unattended installation, imaging, and templates
Azure Arc for servers: onboarding, policy, and extensions
Windows Admin Center for hybrid server management
Storage Spaces Direct and Storage Replica
File server management: DFS, quotas, and file classification
Data deduplication and storage optimisation
Windows Server Update Services and patch management
Performance monitoring and resource optimisation

modules.title: Networking & Virtualisation
modules.description: Configure networking for hybrid environments and manage Hyper-V and container workloads
topics: DNS and DHCP management for hybrid networks
IPAM configuration and subnet management
VPN and ExpressRoute connectivity to Azure
Network Policy Server (NPS) and RADIUS authentication
Software Defined Networking with Hyper-V
Hyper-V: VM deployment, live migration, and replication
Hyper-V networking: virtual switches and NIC teaming
Windows Server containers: Docker and containerd
Network load balancing and failover clustering

modules.title: Azure Integration & Disaster Recovery
modules.description: Integrate on-premises Windows Server with Azure services and implement disaster recovery
topics: Azure Site Recovery: replication, failover, and failback
Azure Backup for Windows Server and Hyper-V workloads
Azure File Sync for hybrid file storage
Azure Monitor Agent and Log Analytics for hybrid monitoring
Azure Update Manager for cross-environment patching
Azure Automation: runbooks, DSC, and hybrid workers
Business continuity planning and RTO/RPO calculations
Migration strategies: on-premises to Azure and server upgrades
Windows Server security hardening and compliance baselines

handsOnLabs.title: Hybrid Identity Configuration
handsOnLabs.description: Set up Entra Connect, configure password hash sync, and verify identity synchronisation between on-premises AD and Entra ID

handsOnLabs.title: Azure Arc Server Management
handsOnLabs.description: Onboard servers to Azure Arc, apply policies, deploy extensions, and manage updates from the Azure portal

handsOnLabs.title: Hyper-V & Hybrid Networking
handsOnLabs.description: Deploy VMs on Hyper-V, configure virtual switches, and establish VPN connectivity to an Azure virtual network

handsOnLabs.title: Azure Site Recovery Failover
handsOnLabs.description: Configure Azure Site Recovery for on-premises VMs, execute a test failover, and verify application recovery

prerequisites: Experience with Windows Server administration (2016 or later)
Understanding of Active Directory and Group Policy
Familiarity with networking concepts: DNS, DHCP, VPN, and TCP/IP
targetAudience: Windows Server administrators managing hybrid environments
Infrastructure engineers integrating on-premises servers with Azure
IT professionals preparing for the AZ-802 certification
Systems administrators upgrading from AZ-800/AZ-801 knowledge

instructor.name: Yair Knijn
instructor.title: Principal Cloud Architect & Engineer
instructor.bio: Microsoft Certified Trainer with extensive experience in Windows Server administration and hybrid infrastructure. Has led numerous hybrid identity and Azure Arc deployments for enterprise organisations transitioning from on-premises to cloud-integrated environments.
certifications: Microsoft Certified: Windows Server Hybrid Administrator Associate

certification.name: Microsoft Certified: Windows Server Hybrid Administrator Associate

personalStory.story: Windows Server is not going anywhere, but how you manage it is changing fast. Most of the organisations I work with have a mix of on-premises servers and Azure resources, and the challenge is managing that hybrid estate without doubling your tooling and processes. Azure Arc and Entra Connect have changed the game -- you can now manage your domain controllers, file servers, and Hyper-V hosts alongside your Azure VMs from a single pane. This course covers the consolidated AZ-802 exam, which finally brings the AZ-800 and AZ-801 content together into one coherent path.
